map.pickerHint: Click the map or drag the pin to set the point.
map.pickerEmpty: Click the map to place the point.
map.plannerHint: Click to add a point, right-click a point to remove it.
map.plannerEmpty: Click the map or search an address to add a point.

auth.googleCompleteSubtitle: Confirm your details to finish signing up with Google.
auth.googleExpired: Your Google session expired. Please sign in with Google again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If an account exists for this email, you'll receive a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.success: Password reset. Please sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidMessage: This password reset link is invalid or incomplete.

landing.title: Run your deliveries in real time
landing.subtitle: Lanely brings your fleet, shipments and teams into one clear, modern TMS, from pickup to proof of delivery.

tracking.title: Real-time tracking
tracking.desc: Follow every shipment from pickup to delivery, live.

deliveries.title: Delivery management
deliveries.desc: Plan, dispatch and confirm deliveries with proof.

teams.title: Built for teams
teams.desc: Multiple companies, roles and permissions out of the box.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.successHint: You can now use all the features of your account.
verify.errorUsed: This verification link has already been used.
verify.missingToken: This verification link is invalid or incomplete.
verify.requiredMessage: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account, then come back here.
verify.resent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

invite.title: Join a company
invite.missingCode: This invitation link is invalid or incomplete.
invite.loggedInPrompt: You are signed in. Accept the invitation to join the company.
invite.newAccountPrompt: Create an account to join the company.
invite.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in, then open the link again.

dashboard.noCompanies: You are not a member of any company yet.
dashboard.createCompanySubtitle: Give your new company a name to get started.
dashboard.createFromMenu: Use the menu in the top-right corner to create your first company.
dashboard.subscriptionRequiredBody: Your current plan does not allow creating a company. Upgrade your subscription to create and manage your own company.
dashboard.joinHint: You can still join an existing company. Ask an owner to invite you by email. Joining never requires a subscription.
dashboard.upgradeSoon: Upgrades aren't available yet. Contact us to get started.

settings.title: Company settings
settings.description: Manage your company's name and logo.
settings.name: Company name
settings.publicCodeHint: Drivers scan this code in the mobile app to link to your company.

legal.title: Legal & billing information
legal.description: Used on invoices and for billing. All fields are optional.

deposit.title: Deposit (warehouse) address
deposit.description: Where your tours start and end. Search an address, then drop or drag the pin to set the exact GPS point. All fields are optional.
deposit.mapHint: Click the map or drag the pin to set the point.
deposit.mapEmpty: Search an address or click the map to place the deposit.

members.title: Members
members.description: People who belong to this company and their permissions.

profiles.title: Mobile profiles
profiles.description: Mobile app identities for your drivers: a username and password, no email.
profiles.passwordEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current password.
profiles.createDescription: Create a mobile identity drivers use to sign in to the app.
profiles.editDescription: Update the username, display name or password.
profiles.deleteBody: This permanently deletes {{name}} and revokes all its sessions. This can't be undone.

seats.full: All seats are in use. Upgrade your plan to add more profiles.
seats.noPlan: No active subscription. Choose a plan to add profiles.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.description: Invite people by email. They join as members once they accept, no subscription needed.
invitations.deleteBody: This permanently deletes the invitation for {{email}}. If it's still pending, its join link stops working immediately.
invitations.deleteAcceptedNote: This person has already joined. Deleting the invitation won't remove them from the company.

clients.title: Clients
clients.description: Your customers: companies and individuals you deliver for.
clients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, reference or email…
clients.archiveBody: {{name}} will be moved to the archive. You can restore it at any time.
clients.deleteBody: {{name}}, its addresses and contacts will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone. Waybills are kept without the client.
clients.deleteArchiveFirst: A client must be archived before it can be deleted.

form.createDescription: Add a customer you deliver for.
form.deliveryBlockedHint: Prevents new deliveries from being assigned to this client.

detail.notFound: This client could not be found.

addresses.title: Addresses
addresses.description: Depots and locations used to plan deliveries.
addresses.draftHint: Add delivery or billing locations. They will be created once the client is saved.
addresses.formDescription: A delivery or billing location for this client.
addresses.label: Label
addresses.locationHint: Search an address to place the pin, or leave it empty to auto-calculate the GPS point from the postal address.
addresses.mapHint: Click the map or drag the pin to set the exact point.
addresses.mapEmpty: Search an address or click the map to place the point.
addresses.deliveryInstructionsPlaceholder: Ring at gate B, trucks under 12m.
addresses.deleteBody: {{name}} will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: People to reach at this client.
contacts.draftHint: Add people to reach for this client. They will be created once the client is saved.
contacts.formDescription: A person to contact at this client.
contacts.deleteBody: {{name}} will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and security.

info.title: Personal information
info.description: Update your name. Your email address can't be changed.
info.emailHint: Your email address can't be changed.

password.title: Change password
password.description: For your security, all your other sessions will be signed out.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices currently signed in to your account. Revoke any you don't recognize.
sessions.currentWarning: This is the device you're currently using. Revoking it will sign you out.
sessions.confirmOthersDescription: Every session except this one will be signed out immediately.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your team.

usage.title: Your usage
usage.description: How much of your subscription you're currently using.
usage.none: You don't have an active subscription yet. Pick a plan below to get started.

confirm.title: Switch to {{plan}}?
confirm.body: Your subscription will be updated to the {{plan}} plan.

update.title: A new version is available
update.description: Reload to get the latest update.

vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.description: Your fleet: trucks, vans and trailers you operate.
vehicles.searchPlaceholder: Search by plate, make, model or VIN…

form.createDescription: Add a vehicle to your fleet.

detail.notFound: This vehicle could not be found.

vehicles.archiveBody: {{plate}} will be moved to the archive. You can restore it at any time.
vehicles.deleteBody: {{plate}} and all its documents and mileage history will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.
vehicles.deleteAlternative: Prefer archiving? You can restore an archived vehicle later.

documents.title: Documents & photos
documents.description: Registration card, insurance, photos and other files.
documents.uploadDescription: PDF, PNG, JPEG or WEBP, up to 10 MB.
documents.dropHint: Drag & drop a file here, or
documents.label: Label (optional)
documents.deleteBody: {{name}} will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.
documents.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type (PDF, PNG, JPEG or WEBP only).

mileage.title: Mileage history
mileage.addDescription: Back-dated and corrective entries are allowed. The latest reading by date sets the vehicle's current mileage.

address.coordsHint: Pick a suggestion to set the exact location.
address.coordsSet: Location set from the selected address.

statusNote.label: Note (optional)
statusNote.hint: Recorded in the status history (anomaly, delivery issue, detail…).

statusBackward.warning: This moves the status backward. Make sure this is what you want before applying.

history.title: Status history
history.description: Every status change, most recent first.

clientWaybills.empty: No consignment note for this client.

goodsTypes.title: Goods type catalog
goodsTypes.description: Reusable goods types that power autocomplete when adding goods to a consignment note. Not linked to existing notes.
goodsTypes.noResults: No goods type matches your search.
goodsTypes.deleteBody: Delete "{{name}}"? Existing consignment notes are not affected.

form.description: Default values pre-filled when this type is picked. Only the name is required.

dock.title: Dock stock
dock.description: Goods currently sitting on your dock, awaiting redelivery.
dock.empty: No goods on the dock right now.
dock.noResults: No goods on the dock match your filters.

dwell.overdue: Dormant stock: on the dock longer than expected.

waybills.title: Consignment notes
waybills.description: Manage your CMR / eCMR consignment notes.
waybills.noResults: No consignment note matches your filters.

bulk.cancelConfirmBody: {{count}} waybill will move to the Cancelled status. This cannot be undone.
bulk.cancelConfirmBody_other: {{count}} waybills will move to the Cancelled status. This cannot be undone.

map.noPoints: No located note for these filters.

client.title: Ordering party
client.label: Ordering party (client)
client.hint: Client this transport is carried out for. Bears the carriage charges.

places.gpsHint: Optional. Leave empty to geocode the address, or set coordinates manually if it cannot be located.

cmr.title: CMR details
cmr.autoPriceHint: Computed from the tariff grid using the route distance, weight and stops. You can still edit it by hand.

form.createDescription: Create a CMR / eCMR consignment note.
form.editDescription: Editing is allowed in Draft and Issued statuses only.
form.geocodingHint: An address could not be located. Set the GPS coordinates manually for the relevant place.

route.title: Route & schedule
route.description: Round trip from your depot to the pickup, then the delivery, and back. Set the planned pickup or delivery time to see estimated arrivals and when to leave.
route.noPlannedTimes: Set a planned pickup or delivery time (in the previous steps) to estimate arrival and departure times.
route.anchoredOnDelivery: Times are computed backwards from the planned delivery time.
route.onSchedule: On track for the planned delivery time.
route.late: Estimated {{duration}} after the planned delivery time.
route.ahead: Estimated {{duration}} before the planned delivery time.

missing.title: Some locations are missing to compute the route:
missing.depotHint: Set your depot GPS coordinates in the company settings (deposit address).

statusDialog.title: Change status
statusDialog.description: Pick the new status for this consignment note.

parcelStatusDialog.title: Change parcel status
parcelStatusDialog.description: Pick the new status for this parcel.

assignDialog.title: Assign consignment note
assignDialog.description: Attach this note to a tour and/or a driver.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel consignment note
cancelDialog.body: Cancel {{reference}}? This moves it to the Cancelled status.

detail.routeHint: Route not computed yet. Use "Recalculate route" to draw it.

tours.title: Tours
tours.description: Group consignment notes into delivery tours.

form.depotHint: Defaults to the company billing address if left empty.

actions.addStopOnMap: Add a stop on the map

statusDialog.title: Change status
statusDialog.description: Pick the new status for this tour.

assignDialog.title: Assign tour
assignDialog.description: Assign a vehicle and a driver to this tour.

addWaybills.title: Add consignment notes
addWaybills.description: Pick consignment notes to add as stops.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel tour
cancelDialog.body: Cancel {{name}}? Its consignment notes will be detached.

reason.UNROUTABLE: Address could not be matched to the road network
reason.TOO_FAR: Address is too far from the road network

detail.noStops: No stop yet. Add consignment notes to build the tour.
detail.previewHint: Live preview of the new order, not saved yet.
detail.addStopHint: Click the map to add a stop.

quickStop.title: Add a stop
quickStop.description: Create a consignment note at this location and attach it to the tour.
quickStop.shipperHint: Defaults to your company; edit if needed.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Tariff grids and fuel surcharge indexation for this company.

tariffs.empty: No tariff grid yet. Create one to start pricing automatically.

form.createDescription: Create a draft grid, then add lines and activate it.
form.name: Name
form.isDefaultHint: Used when no client-specific grid applies. A default grid cannot be tied to a client.
form.clientHint: Tie this grid to a specific client. Leave empty for a company grid.
form.minChargeHint: Floor applied to the grand total.

detail.deleteBody: The grid « {{name}} », its lines and fuel policy will be removed.
detail.deleteAlternative: Prefer deactivating to keep the grid for later.
detail.activateHint: Only an active grid is used for pricing.
detail.componentsHint: Lines are applied in order to build the subtotal.
detail.noComponents: No line yet. Add at least one to price shipments.
detail.fuelHint: Optionally add a fuel surcharge on top of the subtotal.
detail.fuelNone: No fuel policy on this grid.
detail.fuelRemoveBody: The fuel surcharge will no longer apply to this grid.

component.label: Label
component.deleteBody: The line « {{label}} » will be removed from the grid.

fuelPolicy.title: Fuel surcharge
fuelPolicy.description: Apply a surcharge indexed on the government diesel price.
fuelPolicy.thresholdHint: Surcharges apply when the fuel price exceeds this value.
fuelPolicy.referenceHint: Baseline price for the indexed percentage.
fuelPolicy.dieselShareHint: Share of the price exposed to fuel, e.g. 0.30.
fuelPolicy.clampAtZeroHint: No discount when the price drops below the reference.
fuelPolicy.surchargeHint: Lines added above the threshold (per km, per kg, etc.).

fuelPrices.title: Fuel price index
fuelPrices.noIndex: No price stored yet. Refresh to fetch the latest index.

quote.title: Price quote
quote.description: Estimate a price from ad-hoc quantities, without saving.
quote.empty: Build a route or enter quantities to see the price.
quote.noTariff: No grid resolved. Activate a default grid or pick a client grid.
quote.distanceFromRouteHint: Build a route on the map to compute the distance.

breakdown.editUnitPrice: Click to change this price for the estimate
breakdown.overrideNote: Prices edited for this estimate only; the grid is unchanged.

warnings.error.pricing.route-not-computed: Route not computed: distance-based lines are billed at 0.

waybillCard.title: Pricing
waybillCard.notApplicable: Pricing is not available for a cancelled consignment note.
waybillCard.manualHint: You can also set the amount manually by editing the note.

route.title: Distance from a route
route.description: Add addresses or GPS points to compute the distance automatically.
route.useDepot: Start and end at the depot
route.pointsHint: Click the map, search an address, or pick a client.
route.waybillHint: Shipper and consignee: click the map, search an address, or pick a client.
route.clientNoCoords: This client address has no GPS coordinates.
route.searchPlaceholder: Search an address to add a point
route.needPoints: Add at least two located points.
route.needTour: Add the depot and at least one located stop.
route.tourNeedsDepot: An optimized tour needs the depot as its origin.
